calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Continued To Oct-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Roy Johnston, Esq. for Elizabeth A. Collier, Executor;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that a petition was not on file. Mr. Johnston apologized to the Court noting that they just needed to collect small bank accounts, that they tried to get it in on time but it did not happen, and that they were asking for a 30-day continuance. Mr. Johnston confirmed for the Court that he did receive the tentative ruling in this matter.

At the conclusion of comments, the Court continued today's status to October 30, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-26-2011 is admitted to probate. Elizabeth Ann Collier is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Sep-18-2023 the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Aug-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
